---
format: html 
---

# Teaching Assistant 

#### Computational Statistics
Summer 2026

#### Graphical Models in Statistics
Summer 2025

#### Seminar: Machine Learning for Sequential Decision Making
Winter 2023

#### Statistics for Business Administration 
Summer 2020

#### Analysis 1 for Physicists 
Winter 2016


# Master Students

#### Reanalyzing the DREAM 5 data using techniques from graphical modeling
Žiga Gartner. Summer 2026

#### Graphical Dependence Modeling in Stock Market Analysis
Darya Shtromberg. Winter 2025

#### Active Learning for ML-training for Autonomous Vehicles
Adrien Castella. Summer 2024

#### Graph-Simulation Based Analysis of Causal Inference Methods on Instrumental Variables
Qianyun Li. Summer 2023

# Supervised Research Assistants
Sarah Lumpp (2021 – 2023)

Daniel Sturm (2021 – 2022)
